name: Tool Permission Control
description: Enforce runtime checks that bind tool selection, tool inputs, and tool outputs to user intent and policy.
implementation_guidance: Gate every tool call through policy code rather than trusting model-selected actions.
Validate tool arguments against user intent, data classification, and destination rules.
Treat tool outputs as untrusted content when they re-enter the model context.
verification_methods: Run tool-boundary tests for read, write, external-send, and administrative operations.
Confirm untrusted tool output cannot request later tool calls without policy checks.
Review telemetry linking tool calls to user intent and approval state.
